text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 53 

OPROC_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Other Procedures Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments for services considered Part B other 
procedures (i.e., not anesthesia or dialysis) for a given year. The total Beneficiary payments are 
calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines.
